description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a combination of dark and reddish-brown wall panels, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a prominent balcony on the upper floor. The house is surrounded by several trees and greenery, enhancing its integration with the urban landscape. The front facade includes a paved walkway leading to a recessed entryway, partially sheltered by the upper floor. The rear and side elevations display additional balconies and expansive glass doors, maximizing natural light and outdoor connectivity. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on open, airy spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and reddish-brown exterior panels, featuring balconies and surrounded by trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and a paved walkway leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the reddish-brown wall, upper balcony, and a tree partially obscuring the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with two balconies, extensive glass doors, and lush greenery surrounding the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the dark wall panels, large windows, and additional trees nearby.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a paved walkway, partially sheltered by the upper floor, and minimal decorative elements
